testimonials.title: Customer Experiences
testimonials.quote1: Great quality products and excellent service. The 4K TV has completely changed our movie nights. The installation was seamless.
testimonials.quote2: The Inverter AC is remarkably quiet. I was worried about my electricity bill, but the efficiency rating is exactly as advertised. Highly recommended.
testimonials.quote3: Best customer support I've ever experienced. They helped me pick the right tonnage for my office and followed up after installation.

faqPage.title: FAQs - Everything You Need To Know
faqPage.subtitle: Quick answers about choosing and caring for HYUNDAI electronics.
faqPage.q1: How do I pick the right TV size?
faqPage.a1: Measure the distance from your sofa to the wall, then use a viewing-distance chart. Our team can help you match size and resolution to your room.
faqPage.q2: What does inverter mean on an AC?
faqPage.a2: Inverter compressors adjust speed instead of switching on and off fully, which often saves energy and keeps temperatures steadier with less noise.
faqPage.a3: Installation options depend on your region and retailer. Contact us on WhatsApp for guidance and local partner information.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.desc: Click a card for full details and add-to-cart. Navbar and footer stay the same as on the home page.

perfect-smart-tv.title: How to Choose the Perfect Smart TV for Your Living Room
perfect-smart-tv.description: Learn about viewing distances, panel types, and feature sets that matter for your specific space.
perfect-smart-tv.body: Start by measuring your seating distance, then match screen size and resolution. Compare smart platforms, HDR support, and connectivity before you buy.

ac-efficiency.title: Top 5 Tips to Keep Your Air Conditioner Running Efficiently
ac-efficiency.description: Save on energy bills and extend the life of your AC with these simple professional maintenance steps.
ac-efficiency.body: Clean or replace filters on schedule, keep outdoor units clear, set sensible temperatures, seal doors and windows, and book seasonal professional service.

4k-vs-oled.title: Understanding 4K UHD vs. OLED: Which One is Right for You?
4k-vs-oled.description: Demystifying display technologies to help you choose the best image quality for your home.
4k-vs-oled.body: 4K UHD refers to resolution; OLED is a panel technology known for deep blacks and contrast. Your room lighting and content habits should guide the final pick.

productDetailExtra.manualCardDesc: Download the full user manual for technical guidance and installation instructions.
